description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3.0 Docker image and runs a before_script that installs rspec, bundler, and yard with `gem install rspec bundler yard --no-document` and installs rubocop version 0.47.1 with `gem install rubocop -v 0.47.1 --no-document`. Define a single job named rubocop in the default test stage that executes the command `rubocop`. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required, and the pipeline does not deploy anywhere.
